app.title: Show HN: WhatCable, a tiny menu bar app for inspecting USB-C cables
app.author: sleepingNomad
app.description: macOS menu bar app for identifying USB-C cables and devices
proposed_tests: Run the app on a macOS system and verify correct USB-C cable detection
Check the app's documentation for correct usage and troubleshooting
Verify the app's performance and resource usage on macOS
